exportDataDesc: Export current workspace mind map data as files for backup or migration
jsonExportHint: JSON: Complete data including nodes, relations, and conversations; can be re-imported
markdownExportHint: Markdown: Outline format suitable for reading and documentation archiving
importDataDesc: Import mind map data from a file into the current workspace. Imported data gets new IDs to avoid conflicts
importJsonHint: JSON: Complete data file exported from DeepMindMap (.json)
importMarkdownHint: Markdown: Hierarchical outline format (## for root nodes, indented lists for children)
importNoOverwrite: Imported data will be added to the current workspace without overwriting existing data.
backupBeforeImport: It's recommended to export a backup before importing.
importFailed: Import failed, please check file format
